name: Haystacks
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 15 Minutes Bake Time: No bake
1. Melt the Butter Flavor Crisco, peanut butter, and butterscotch chips in a large saucepan over very low heat. Stir constantly until completely melted. Remove from heat.
2. Pour the corn flakes into a large bowl. Spread the hot butterscotch mixture evenly over the corn flakes. Stir with a large spoon until all the flakes are coated. Add the chocolate chips and stir to combine.
3. Scoop out portions of the mixture (about 1/4 cup) onto wax paper-lined baking sheets, forming small mounds. Sprinkle chopped peanuts or chocolate jimmies on top if desired.
4. Refrigerate until firm before serving. Makes approximately 3 dozen cookies.
Shared by: David Knight
